[[Chief Technician]] '''Boz Addle''' was an engineer working in the [[Spaceport tower/Legends|hangar bays]] of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Mooring tower/Legends|mooring tower]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. His duty was to maintain the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], and he seems to have been a non-[[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] specialist working for the Order, rather than a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] himself.

==Biography==
For [[Standard year/Legends|years]], Boz Addle had been working as a passionate chief technician during the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-wide conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During the height of the war, Boz worked in the higher levels of the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet|world]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], for he had been assessing and caring for incoming ships with the necessary enthusiasm. He always took things seriously and he deeply cared for all the ships he was responsible for. Boz particularly loved courier ships. When [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jai Maruk]] returned from a reconnaissance mission in the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian]] trade route, he inspected his battered and battered ship ''[[Limit of Vision]]'', a [[Seltaya-class fast courier]].<ref name="ydr" />

==Personality and traits==
Chief Boz was a skilled and passionate specialist, able to differentiate different types of damage by a quick visual inspection. Although he cared deeply for all the ships he tended, he was particularly fond of fast, streamlined couriers like the [[Seltaya-class fast courier|''Seltaya''-class]].<ref name="ydr" />
